worthSeeing.title: Persepolis:
worthSeeing.text: Ruins of the Persian Empire's ceremonial capital, one of antiquity's greatest sites.

worthSeeing.title: Isfahan:
worthSeeing.text: Half the world was said to be Isfahan - mosques, bridges, and bazaars of surpassing beauty.

worthSeeing.title: Shiraz:
worthSeeing.text: City of poets, gardens, and wine heritage near the ruins of Persepolis.
